description: The ProtoFluxNodeDebugInfo component is used to gather Debug Info on a particular ProtoFlux node and it's group.

fields.Node: The ProtoFlux node to get Debug Info on.
fields.IsBuilt: Whether the protoflux node group this is in is built.
fields.IndexInGroup: The node's position in its group.
fields.AllocationIndex: The allocation index of this node in its group.
fields.GroupName: The autogenerated name of the node group.
fields.GroupIsValid: Whether the group this node is a part of is valid.
fields.GroupNodeCount: The number of nodes in the group this node is a part of.
fields.NodeInstanceHash: The hash of this node instance.
fields.GroupRegisteredForContinuousChanges: Whether the group this node is a part of is registered for continuous changes. See ContinuouslyChanging
fields.GroupRegisteredForUpdates: Whether this group is registered for updates.
fields.NodeContinuouslyChanging: Whether the node this component is debugging is continously changing itself. See ContinuouslyChanging.
